interface.name: PS_G_inmateOverview
interface.definition: a!localVariables( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gridField_v3"( data: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_recordData"( recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683" ), shadeAlternateRows: true, selectable: true, selectionStyle: "ROW_HIGHLIGHT", maxSelections: 1, selectionSaveInto: a!save(ri!selectedInmate,fv!selectedRows), columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gridColumn"( label: "Vorname", sortField: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/7daa88ab-46be-4aa0-8fd9-53cf52511478", value: fv!row[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/7daa88ab-46be-4aa0-8fd9-53cf52511478"] ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gridColumn"( label: "Nachname", sortField: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/897606a4-d50b-4a42-bcd0-e4d68bbb2856", value: fv!row[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/897606a4-d50b-4a42-bcd0-e4d68bbb2856"] ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gridColumn"( label: "Sektor", sortField: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/5fd06b1d-3eee-439d-8128-6f16b38d955e/5cd0e531-bede-4d76-8761-65c73515a8d5", value: fv!row[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/5fd06b1d-3eee-439d-8128-6f16b38d955e/5cd0e531-bede-4d76-8761-65c73515a8d5"] ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gridColumn"( label: "Zelle", sortField: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/f978081b-dcdd-443e-a6d2-c9b7d8755b6a", value: fv!row[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/f978081b-dcdd-443e-a6d2-c9b7d8755b6a"] ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gridColumn"( /*label: "Lebenslang",*/ width: "ICON", sortField: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/3855ee10-e9c5-4d3f-86ce-3d140949d2e1", value: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( value: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextIcon"( caption: "Lebenslang", icon: if( fv!row[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:b9f2b8a1-aa3c-420e-9856-a362e5c58683/3855ee10-e9c5-4d3f-86ce-3d140949d2e1"], "dungeon", "" ) ) ) ), } ) )
